title: Better Dogs x Doggy Talents Next!
description: The models from Better Dogs, now in Doggy Talents Next (as a resource pack)!
body:
__Better Dogs X Doggy Talents Next is a resource pack. This means you can use it in any server that has Doggy Talents Next installed!__

**This resource pack adds all but the special dog breeds from the Better Dogs resource pack to the Doggy Talents Next mod as selectable skins. **The Better Dogs X Doggy Talents Next resource pack requires the Doggy Talents Next mod to work! You can find the mod here:

https://www.modrinth.com/mod/doggy-talents-next

 

Check out all the Better Dogs skins this mod adds to Doggy Talents Next here:

https://www.modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-dogs

_Note: the Better Dogs resource pack is not required for Better Dogs x Doggy Talents Next to work. You only need this resource pack._

 

Make sure you're using Doggy Talents __Next!__ The old Doggy Talents mod won't work with Better Dogs x Doggy Talents Next.

 

CREDITS
This resource pack was made in collaboration with the DTN dev team.

* Coding and model conversion by DashieDev ダシデーブ * Coding and model conversion by MashXP ｜マッシーXP * Models and textures by Mrblueyeti  

Note: this resource pack is still in beta
